name: The Whistleblower
overview: Sanket, an intern doctor studying at a government hospital discovers a massive medical entrance exam scam that has been running for years, lured by greed becomes a part of it, only to lose everything that his perfect life was made of. Now, determined to find his father’s killer, he turns into a whistleblower, unaware of how deep the rot runs.
